_meta.notes: Item PNGs flattened under items/ (original filenames). Layered Binnie serum/genome icons from items/machines/ kept with their dotted names (serum.*.png, genome.*.png). Gendustry machines are flat-textured cubes: each has top/side/bottom faces under blocks/<machine>/, extracted and renamed <machine>_<face>.png to avoid collisions (apiary has only top+side). Binnie machines are NOT cubes with per-face textures: each is rendered from a single tile texture-atlas at assets/genetics/textures/tile/<Machine>.png that the custom tile model UV-maps onto a multi-part 3D model. There is no separate casing+panel split — the whole machine model uses one atlas sheet (e.g. Isolator.png). Generic frames GeneticMachine/AdvGeneticMachine/MasterGeneticMachine/LabMachine atlases are also included as shared base casings. needsIsoRender is set true on all machine entries (they are 3D and benefit from isometric rendering).

items_extra._note: Supporting/related item textures not 1:1 with an i18n English key but useful for the tracker.

Industrial Apiary._note: no dedicated bottom.png; side reused for bottom

Isolator._note: Binnie tile texture-atlas, UV-mapped onto custom 3D model

Genepool._note: Binnie tile texture-atlas (DNA Genebank / Сборщик ДНК)

machines_shared_atlases._note: Generic Binnie casing atlases shared by lab machines + the database tile, included for completeness.

_missing: Acclimatiser (machines.binnie): no dedicated tile or block texture found in assets/genetics or assets/binniecore; rendered from the shared GeneticMachine atlas at runtime, no per-machine sheet exists.
Lab Stand (machines.binnie): no dedicated block/tile texture found; the Lab Stand is a thin housing rendered procedurally from a shared casing atlas (no Standalone <name>.png in the jar).
Ethanol (resources): no item/fluid texture matched in either jar (genetics has no ethanol icon; gendustry fluids are liquiddna/mutagen/protein only).
Bacteria Vector exact icon (resources): mapped to items/bacteriaDNA.png as the closest polymerised-bacteria icon; no texture literally named 'vector' exists.
